# CWE-524 negative: token kept in request context only (pure stdlib)
lang: go
file: CWE-524-safe.pure.go
variant: pure-go
---
package sample

import (
	"context"
	"net/http"
)

type ctxKey string

const sessionTokenKey ctxKey = "session_token"

func StoreSessionToken(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {
	ctx := context.WithValue(r.Context(), sessionTokenKey, r.Header.Get("Authorization"))
	*r = *r.WithContext(ctx)
	w.WriteHeader(http.StatusOK)
}

func FetchSessionToken(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {
	if r.Header.Get("X-UID") != r.URL.Query().Get("uid") {
		http.Error(w, "forbidden", http.StatusForbidden)
		return
	}
	tok, _ := r.Context().Value(sessionTokenKey).(string)
	w.Write([]byte(tok))
}
